REAL ESTATE & AI 3rd Place — Anti-Slopathon, Mar 2026

Autonomous AI Agent Delivering Invest/Avoid Verdicts on NYC Real Estate

SiteIQ fuses geospatial mapping, live transit data, and Generative AI to produce structured investment reports — automating analysis from hours down to under 3 seconds.

Date

March 2026

Duration

48 hours

Team

3 members

Category

REAL ESTATE & AI

PythonGeospatial APIsGenerative AI
01 / 04

The Problem

Real estate investors make high-stakes decisions on incomplete information. Analyzing transit access, zoning, demographics, and market comps takes days and requires multiple specialist tools.

The Solution

SiteIQ ingests live NYC transit feeds, zoning data, and property records into a unified geospatial pipeline. An autonomous reasoning agent issues a binary Invest/Avoid verdict with a structured supporting report.

Key Features

01

Live Data Ingestion

Real-time NYC transit APIs, zoning records, and property market feeds via GCP Pub/Sub.

02

Autonomous Reasoning Agent

LLM-based agent with tool access for data querying, calculation, and report generation.

03

Structured Report Output

Every verdict ships with a JSON report enabling full audit traceability.

04

React Dashboard

Interactive map visualization with drill-down verdict details for each property.

Tech Stack

AI / Agents

LLM Reasoning AgentGoogle Gemini APIRAG

Data

GCP Pub/SubBigQueryGeospatial APIs

Frontend

ReactMapbox GL

Backend
